Home/FHA Mortgage Lenders Florida
FHA Mortgage Lenders Florida

FHA mortgage lenders in Florida

We're dedicated FHA mortgage lenders serving home buyers and homeowners across all 67 Florida counties — with fast pre-approvals, competitive rates, and a process that's genuinely easy.

Get My Free Rate QuoteCall __PHONE_DISPLAY__
All 67 countiesSame-day pre-approvalFHA specialistsPurchase & refinance

Get your free FHA quote

No obligation. See your rate & payment in minutes.

🔒 Your information is secure. By submitting you agree to be contacted about FHA loan options. This is not a commitment to lend.

Thank you!

An FHA mortgage specialist will reach out shortly with your personalized Florida rate quote.

Why Us

Trusted FHA mortgage lenders serving all of Florida

Choosing the right FHA lender matters as much as the loan itself. We specialize in FHA financing across all 67 Florida counties and guide you from first call to closing day with clear answers and fast turnarounds.

Fast pre-approvals

Often same-day, so you can make offers with confidence in a competitive Florida market.

FHA specialists

FHA is our focus — from 3.5% down loans to 203(k) renovation and streamline refinances.

Statewide reach

From Miami to Jacksonville and the Panhandle, we know local limits and down payment assistance.

The Process

Your path to an FHA loan, simplified

01

Get pre-approved

Share your goals; we review your scenario and issue a pre-approval, often the same day.

02

Shop with confidence

Make offers knowing your budget and your county's FHA loan limit.

03

Lock your rate

We compare FHA options, lock a competitive rate, and manage appraisal and underwriting.

04

Close & move in

Sign, get your keys, and settle into your new Florida home.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

How do I choose an FHA mortgage lender in Florida?+
Look for a lender that specializes in FHA loans, offers fast pre-approvals, knows your county's loan limits and local down payment assistance, and clearly explains rates and mortgage insurance. We do all of the above across Florida.
Do you offer FHA loans across all of Florida?+
Yes. We serve home buyers and homeowners in all 67 Florida counties, from Miami and Fort Lauderdale to Tampa, Orlando, Jacksonville, and the Panhandle.
How fast can I get pre-approved for an FHA loan?+
In many cases we can issue an FHA pre-approval the same day once we review your basic financial details, helping you make competitive offers quickly.
Do you handle FHA refinances too?+
Yes. In addition to purchase loans, we offer FHA Streamline and cash-out refinances, as well as 203(k) renovation loans for Florida homeowners.
